- What changed and why?

## Acceptance Criteria Checklist
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from Linear issue are implemented.
- [ ] API/data/UI impact reviewed.
- [ ] Security/privacy implications reviewed.
- [ ] Verification evidence attached.

- Commands run:
  - `pnpm build`
  - `pnpm test`
- Output summary:

## Notes
- Migration notes, rollout concerns, or follow-up tasks.
